title: Embracing Crunchy Caraway Bread
description: A flavorful bread infused with caraway seeds and crunchy texture.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine warm water, yeast, and sugar. Let it sit for 5-7 minutes, or until foamy.
2. Add flour, caraway seeds, crunch, and salt to the bowl. Mix until a shaggy dough forms.
3. Add eggs and mix until the dough comes together.
4. Knead the dough for 10-12 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
5. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
7. Punch down the dough and shape it into a round loaf.
8. Place the loaf on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove the bread from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for 10-15 minutes before slicing.
10. Serve warm, or at room temperature.
